error_signature: Quota exceeded for quota metric ‘Read requests’
title: Google Sheets API quota exceeded
symptom: The workflow fails with an error indicating that the quota for read requests has been exceeded, preventing further API calls.
not_this_if: API calls are within the allowed quota
Using a different API or service
root_cause: The Google Sheets API has a limit on the number of read requests that can be made per minute. When this limit is exceeded, the API returns a quota exceeded error, which halts further requests until the quota resets.
fix_steps: Implement a wait node to space out API calls
Monitor the API usage in the Google Cloud Dashboard
Consider optimizing the workflow to reduce the number of requests
agent_instruction: Add a wait node to your workflow to manage the frequency of API calls to Google Sheets.
